hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-gray-900
hierarchy.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#E8622A]

layout_and_spacing.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 sm:gap-8

components.header: Sticky glassmorphism header. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-gray-100. z-50.
components.button_primary: bg-[#E8622A] text-white hover:bg-[#D05625] transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-medium inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#1E3A6E] border-2 border-[#1E3A6E] hover:bg-[#1E3A6E] hover:text-white transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-medium inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.card: bg-white border border-gray-100 p-8 rounded-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-sm

pages_and_routing.Home: Hero section with gradient overlay, Introduction, Bento grid of Services, Industries with images, Testimonials, CTA section.
pages_and_routing.About Us: Company overview, Mission & Vision (2-col layout), Leadership profiles, Core Values.
pages_and_routing.Services: Detailed cards for IT Staffing, Manpower Supply, RPO, Payroll. Use lucide-react icons.
pages_and_routing.Industries We Serve: Showcase of IT, Manufacturing, Construction, Facility Management, International markets. Large image cards.
pages_and_routing.Careers: List of Job Openings using Accordion. Resume upload form inside a Dialog or side panel.
pages_and_routing.Clients: Logo marquee or grid showing companies worked with.
pages_and_routing.Contact Us: Contact form, Contact Info (Phone, Email, Address), embedded Google Map.

animation_and_interaction.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion `initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}` for sections.
animation_and_interaction.hover_effects: Cards lift slightly `-translate-y-1`. Buttons have subtle scale `hover:scale-105`.
animation_and_interaction.marquee: Use `react-fast-marquee` for the Clients section for smooth infinite scroll.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the user's provided logo for the header and footer.
Use the brand colors Navy Blue (#1E3A6E) as the primary structural color and Orange (#E8622A) for highlights and primary CTAs.
Use Outfit for Headings and DM Sans for Body.
Ensure all text over images or dark backgrounds has a high contrast ratio. Use a navy blue overlay on the hero image (e.g. bg-[#1E3A6E]/80).
Use shadcn/ui components for Form, Input, Textarea, Button, Card, Accordion, Dialog.
Use the company address: H.no.4-106, Pragathi Nagar, Moosapet, Balanagar, Rangareddy, Telangana 500018 in the Footer and Contact Us page.
